notes: SHIP v1.14.216 — RACK MAP × CAGE NUT COMPASS MERGE (STAGE 1) (per HANDOFF-rackmap-compass-merge.md, base .215). Makes the Cage Nut Compass twin-rail the FLOOR of the Rack Map ops-tool so it's never blank in the two void cases: (1) cold start (no RACK_VIEWER_LAST_KEY yet) and (2) gone rack (last key no longer resolves → _rackResolve step-5 silent return). EDIT 1: in the OPS_TABS.rackmap open-time block, paint rackViewer_renderFloor(rack-viewer-target) FIRST, unconditionally, before the last-rack restore — a successful silent restore innerHTML-swaps over it; a silent miss leaves the floor in place. One insertion covers both void cases, no _rackResolve edit. EDIT 2: NEW rackViewer_renderFloor(target) — standalone generic 24U cage-nut/RU reference rail built from the EXISTING cn-* twin-rail classes (.cn-rail-viewport/.cn-rail-wrap/.cn-rail/.cn-u/.cn-u-context/.cn-u-label/.cn-holes/.cn-hole — all confirmed defined 6517-6595), decoupled from the compass page (does NOT call compass_render or touch #cn-rail-viewport inside #pg-compass). Head 'REFERENCE · CAGE NUT & RU MAP' + invite hint 'Scan or type a rack ID…'. CSS: 2 new rules only (.rv-floor-head/.rv-floor-hint) in existing token vocab (--mono/--fs-caption/--fs-micro/--slate, all with fallbacks) — net-zero brace delta, no cn-* rule modified. EDIT 4 (compass reference door): untouched — Cage Nut subtab (redesign_homeCompass/compass_render) still the canonical pure-reference door; floor REUSES the visual, does not orphan the door. DEVIATION FROM SPEC — EDIT 3 (land-on-Elevation view default) SHIPPED AS NO-OP: verified in live code that the Rack Map ops-tool (rackViewer_request→_rackResolve→renderElevation @37202, and the Master fall-through master_renderHit @27610 which also calls renderElevation) ALWAYS renders elevation and has NO List/Elevation toggle. The resultView toggle + master_setResultView belong ONLY to the separate Master DOC search surface (master_renderResults); _masterQueryState has no resultView key (defaults 'list'). Flipping that default would change the Master DOC tool's default view — a DIFFERENT surface than this merge targets, unrequested scope creep. So EDIT 3's intent (Rack Map lands on Elevation, DV#2) is ALREADY satisfied structurally; no code change made. DV#5's 'List/Elevation toggle round-trips' describes the Master DOC surface, not Rack Map. SW CACHE_VERSION bumped .215->.216: stamp-only, no precache LIST change, but REQUIRED so devices fetch the new dct-ios.html bytes (same no-op-without-bump gotcha as .213/.214/.215). Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline HTML blocks · CSS braces net-0 (2 rules added, 0 modified) · CRLF preserved · grep function rackViewer_renderFloor == 1 · no #cn-rail-viewport / compass_render reference in the new fn (page-independent) · three-stamp lockstep .215->.216. ROLLBACK: git revert — purely additive (1 new fn, 1 insertion, 2 CSS rules), no store writes, no schema/migration, reference door untouched. STAGE 2 (future, HANDOFF-rack-templates.md): RACK_TEMPLATES platform-aware geometry + Master uStart/uEnd slot ingest — patches THIS floor renderer; not in this ship. DEVICE-VERIFY (hard stop): remove+re-add PWA (URL cache-bust does NOT bypass a registered SW — let the new SW activate); confirm app reads v1.14.216, then: (1) COLD START — clear rack viewer last key / fresh state, open Rack Map → Compass reference rail paints (twin L·RAIL/R·RAIL, U24→U1, dim holes), head 'REFERENCE · CAGE NUT & RU MAP', hint invites scan/type — NOT blank; (2) RECENT-RACK — load a rack, leave Rack Map, return → real rack Elevation renders (equipment bands, lit holes), NOT the floor; (3) GONE RACK — load rack, delete its deployment, reopen Rack Map → floor appears, no NOT-FOUND flash, no blank; (4) TYPE-TO-SCOPE — from floor, type/scan valid rack ID → floor swaps to that Elevation; (5) NO FLOOR FLASH — type partial/invalid ID over a loaded rack → debounced silent misses must NOT repaint the floor (floor painted once on open, not per silent miss); (6) REFERENCE DOOR — Hardware → Cage Nut subtab → standalone Compass still renders; (7) LEGACY — ?legacy=1 byte-identical. If cold start still blank → EDIT 1 floor call didn't fire or rack-viewer-target absent at 50ms setTimeout ordering. If blank after SW-looking change → cache-key bump didn't take.
